candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

candidates.why: This line appears within the current liabilities section and is a standard IFRS label for current borrowings.
Current financing liability shown within current liabilities; suitable component of short-term debt.

candidates.why: Exact current tax payable/current tax liabilities line.

candidates.why: Exact total PPE line; preferred over gross/accumulated components and over right-of-use assets.

candidates.why: Gross ROU asset component, not core total PPE and includes lease-related assets.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets -  Accumulated Depreciation

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite concatenated text, the values equal cash flow from operating activities after working-capital changes; best match for net operating cash flow.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital Changes in working capital
candidates.why: This is explicitly before working-capital changes, so not the final operating cash flow target.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: Chosen from cash flow sheet; label is concatenated with the next section heading but values indicate the net cash flow from operating activities line.
